LightningComponentBundle.description: AI-powered conversational insights grounded in live Salesforce record data. Drop on any record page or app page.

property.name: cardTitle
property.label: Card Title
property.description: Controls the title shown at the top of the component. Example: Opportunity Insights Assistant.

property.name: defaultDepth
property.label: Default Relationship Depth
property.description: Sets the starting relationship depth for insights and compare mode. Use 1 for direct child records only, 2 for children plus grandchildren, or 3 for the deepest context.

property.name: defaultMode
property.label: Default Mode
property.description: Chooses which experience opens first when both modes are available. Select Insights for chat on the current record or Compare for side-by-side record analysis.

property.name: availableModes
property.label: Available Modes
property.description: Controls which modes users can access. Both shows Insights and Compare, insightsOnly shows only the record chat experience, and compareOnly shows only the compare experience.

property.name: startWithContextPanelOpen
property.label: Start With Context Panel Open
property.description: If enabled, the context settings panel is expanded when the component first loads in insights mode.

property.name: maxDepthAllowed
property.label: Maximum Relationship Depth
property.description: Limits the highest depth users can select in insights and compare mode. Set this to 1, 2, or 3 to control how much related-record context can be included.

property.name: defaultFieldCategoriesCsv
property.label: Default Field Categories (CSV)
property.description: Optional comma-separated field category API names to preselect in insights and compare mode. Valid categories are core, financial, status, dates, relationships, custom, and other. Example: core,status,financial,custom.

property.name: defaultRelationshipsCsv
property.label: Default Relationships (CSV)
property.description: Optional comma-separated child relationship API names to preselect in insights and compare mode. Values depend on the object. Example for Account: Contacts,Opportunities,Cases.

property.name: showModelPicker
property.label: Show Model Picker
property.description: If enabled, users can choose the AI model from the header of the chat panel.

property.name: defaultModelApiName
property.label: Default Model API Name
property.description: Optional model API name to preselect when it is available in the org. Example: sfdc_ai__DefaultVertexAIGeminiPro30 or sfdc_ai__DefaultGPT4Omni.

property.name: showSuggestedPrompts
property.label: Show Suggested Prompts
property.description: If enabled, the welcome state shows built-in starter prompts that users can click to begin the conversation.

property.name: showUsageMetrics
property.label: Show Usage Metrics
property.description: If enabled, the component shows token and flex-credit usage estimates in insights and compare mode.

property.name: promptWarningThresholdTokens
property.label: Large Prompt Warning Threshold (Tokens)
property.description: Shows a warning before sending an estimated prompt larger than this many tokens in insights or compare mode. Set to 0 to disable the warning. Large prompts can be slower, use more flex credits, and may force some context to be truncated.

property.name: maxCompareRecords
property.label: Maximum Compare Records
property.description: Limits how many records users can select at once in compare mode. Lower this to reduce prompt size and keep comparisons focused.

property.name: relatedRecordsPerRelationship
property.label: Related Records Per Relationship
property.description: Controls how many child records are loaded for each selected relationship in insights and compare mode. Higher values provide richer context but increase tokens and response cost.

property.name: hideContextWarnings
property.label: Hide Context Warnings
property.description: If enabled, the component suppresses the inline context warning banners in the context panel and chat panel.

property.name: persistConversation
property.label: Persist Conversation
property.description: If enabled, conversation history and usage metrics are stored in browser localStorage only so they can be restored when the user returns to the same record on the same browser.

property.name: showSuggestedComparisonRecords
property.label: Show Suggested Comparison Records
property.description: If enabled, compare mode shows suggested related records, such as sibling records or recently modified records of the same type.

property.name: enableSuggestedFollowUps
property.label: Enable Suggested Follow-Ups
property.description: If enabled, the component generates suggested follow-up questions after each AI response. This makes an additional AI call and typically consumes about 2 extra flex credits per message turn.

property.name: cardTitle
property.label: Card Title
property.description: Controls the title shown at the top of the component. Example: Pipeline Comparison Assistant.

property.name: defaultDepth
property.label: Default Relationship Depth
property.description: Sets the starting relationship depth for insights and compare mode after records are selected. Use 1 for direct child records only, 2 for children plus grandchildren, or 3 for the deepest context.

property.name: defaultMode
property.label: Default Mode
property.description: Chooses which experience opens first when the component loads. Select Insights for record chat or Compare for side-by-side record analysis.

property.name: availableModes
property.label: Available Modes
property.description: Controls which modes users can access. Both shows Insights and Compare, insightsOnly shows only the record chat experience, and compareOnly shows only the compare experience.

property.name: startWithContextPanelOpen
property.label: Start With Context Panel Open
property.description: If enabled, the context settings panel is expanded when insights mode is opened.

property.name: maxDepthAllowed
property.label: Maximum Relationship Depth
property.description: Limits the highest depth users can select in insights and compare mode. Set this to 1, 2, or 3 to control how much related-record context can be included.

property.name: defaultFieldCategoriesCsv
property.label: Default Field Categories (CSV)
property.description: Optional comma-separated field category API names to preselect in insights and compare mode. Valid categories are core, financial, status, dates, relationships, custom, and other. Example: core,status,financial,custom.

property.name: defaultRelationshipsCsv
property.label: Default Relationships (CSV)
property.description: Optional comma-separated child relationship API names to preselect in insights and compare mode after records are selected. Values depend on the object. Example for Account: Contacts,Opportunities,Cases.

property.name: showModelPicker
property.label: Show Model Picker
property.description: If enabled, users can choose the AI model from the header of the chat panel.

property.name: defaultModelApiName
property.label: Default Model API Name
property.description: Optional model API name to preselect when it is available in the org. Example: sfdc_ai__DefaultVertexAIGeminiPro30 or sfdc_ai__DefaultGPT4Omni.

property.name: showSuggestedPrompts
property.label: Show Suggested Prompts
property.description: If enabled, the welcome state shows built-in starter prompts that users can click to begin the conversation.

property.name: showUsageMetrics
property.label: Show Usage Metrics
property.description: If enabled, the component shows token and flex-credit usage estimates in insights and compare mode.

property.name: promptWarningThresholdTokens
property.label: Large Prompt Warning Threshold (Tokens)
property.description: Shows a warning before sending an estimated prompt larger than this many tokens in insights or compare mode. Set to 0 to disable the warning. Large prompts can be slower, use more flex credits, and may force some context to be truncated.

property.name: maxCompareRecords
property.label: Maximum Compare Records
property.description: Limits how many records users can select at once in compare mode. Lower this to reduce prompt size and keep comparisons focused.

property.name: relatedRecordsPerRelationship
property.label: Related Records Per Relationship
property.description: Controls how many child records are loaded for each selected relationship in insights and compare mode. Higher values provide richer context but increase tokens and response cost.

property.name: hideContextWarnings
property.label: Hide Context Warnings
property.description: If enabled, the component suppresses the inline context warning banners in the context panel and chat panel.

property.name: persistConversation
property.label: Persist Conversation
property.description: If enabled, conversation history and usage metrics are stored in browser localStorage only so they can be restored when the user returns to the same record or app context on the same browser.

property.name: showSuggestedComparisonRecords
property.label: Show Suggested Comparison Records
property.description: If enabled, compare mode shows suggested related records, such as sibling records or recently modified records of the same type.

property.name: enableSuggestedFollowUps
property.label: Enable Suggested Follow-Ups
property.description: If enabled, the component generates suggested follow-up questions after each AI response. This makes an additional AI call and typically consumes about 2 extra flex credits per message turn.
